function.message: I couldn’t complete the oldest inbox request because one of the five specified source files does not exist: `50_finance/purchases/_2026_01_19__eur_000030__bill__northstar_domain_and_mail.md`. I verified the other four requested files are present and readable, but the task explicitly requests OCR for all five, so completing only four would be partial.
function.rulebook_notes: Per process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update, if task is not fully doable, stop without partial edits; per reliability guidance, avoid partial completion when required data is missing.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox instruction in `00_inbox/724_next-task.md` requires OCR of five specific files. Direct read of the fifth underscored path failed (file not found), and a follow-up find in `50_finance/purchases` returned no match for that filename. Required input is missing, so completion would require guessing or partial delivery.
